title: Ninja Moves
description: Become a Parkour Master using rolls, climbing, wall jumps and wall runs! Easy to use, but really hard to master!
body:
Become a Parkour Master using rolls, climbing, wall jumps and wall runs! This pack is easy to use, but really, really hard to master! > This pack is meant to be used with a flat world (light world, no entities), with a reasonnable amount of people. It do not suit survival well. ## Main features - **Crawl:** sneak and look down near a hole. (easy) - **Soft Landing:** sneak and land on wheat, sands, wools, leaves or sponge to reduce falling damage. (easy) - **Roll:** jump from 4 blocks or more and sneak to make a roll on the ground and reduce falling damage. (easy) - **Climb:** sneak in air, looking at the direction of the block to climb. Shift right/left parallel. (medium) - **Wall Jump:** sprint and jump facing a wall to have a quick momentum for a second jump. (medium) - **Wall Run:** sprint parallel to a wall. (hard) ## Additional features - **Additional climbable:** bamboo, chain, fences, iron bars, lightning_rod and buttons. - **Auto Enable Ninjas:** players are automaticly allowed to use the moves, but you can now decide, as an admin, who is a ninja or not, editing a scoreboard ```/scoreboard players set PLAYER_NAME fknm.enable 0``` ```/scoreboard players set PLAYER_NAME fknm.enable 1``` ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fknm:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
